name: Rosa

base_stats.notable: Highest base Attack of any documented hero (4989). Gen 4 is the power-creep turning point.

conquest.name: Battle Focus
conquest.description: Clears all debuffs for all squads and increases their Attack for several seconds, during which they remain immune to debuffs.
sources: heaven-guardian.com Gen 4 guide (Conquest Skills > Battle Focus)
kingshotdata.com/heroes/rosa (table of contents: Conquest > Battle Focus)
conquest.category_resolution_note: 9x3x3 confirmed Battle Focus is a CONQUEST skill across 4 independent sources. My earlier re-audit placed it as Expedition based on a misreading of kingshotwiki — corrected.

conquest.name: Flutterfang
conquest.description: Deals damage to enemies in its path.

expedition.name: Swoon Chakra
expedition.description: Reduces enemy squads' Attack Speed and healing effects.

expedition.name: Chaos Gambit
expedition.description: Grants a 40% chance of increasing all squads' damage dealt.

expedition.name: Rose of War
expedition.description: Reduces damage dealt by all enemy squads.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Night Reverie
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Upon casting Battle Focus, increases Attack until the end of the battle. Unlocked only when Aeolian is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Perihelion
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Lethality of rallied troops. Unlocked only when Aeolian is equipped.

exclusive_gear.name: Aeolian
exclusive_gear.notes: Highest exclusive gear power documented (416,250). Highest Expedition percentages (92.50%). Gen 4 power creep is real.

order: Max Battle Focus first (Conquest active — debuff clear + army Attack buff)
Then Chaos Gambit (40% proc for 50% damage)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Rosa for arena crossover — arena specialist role.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Rosa's Golden Rhythm +30% archer Attack makes her a natural fit with archer-heavy compositions. Her Battle Focus debuff-clearing makes her valuable against control-heavy enemies. Her Chaos Gambit's 40% proc chance for +50% damage fits bursty rally windows.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js marks Rosa as F2P=false with note 'Accessible through specific events. Only invest if you see a clear path to consistent shard collection.' 3 F2P pools listed but shard accumulation is considered too slow for practical F2P investment.

rally.reasoning: Strong offensive archer and arena specialist.

lore_background.title: The Arena Specialist
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Arena-focused archer with floral/battle imagery. Skill flavor text references "Battle Focus" for debuff-clearing meditation, "Rose of War" for damage reduction, "Flutterfang" for her signature path attack, "Golden Rhythm" for archer amplification, and her exclusive gear "Aeolian" (wind-themed). Her role is community-framed as an arena specialist. No dedicated backstory was published on kingshotwiki, kingshotdata.com, or kingshotguide.org.
lore_background.source_note: No narrative backstory section was published for Rosa on any consulted source (kingshotwiki.com/heroes/rosa, kingshotdata.com/heroes/rosa, kingshotguide.org/heroes/rosa).

deep_analysis: Rosa is the arena specialist of Gen 4 — the Legendary Archer with the highest base Attack of any documented hero (4989) and the first hero to cross into the Gen 4 power-creep tier. Her kit is a mix of single-target damage and squad-wide debuff/cleanse mechanics. Her Conquest skill Flutterfang deals up to Attack × 300% damage in a path. Her Expedition tree is unusually wide — 5 skills covering buff, cleanse, debuff, and archer-specific amplification. Battle Focus clears all debuffs for squads and grants up to +7% Attack for up to 5 seconds with debuff immunity during the window. Swoon Chakra reduces enemy Attack Speed by up to 3% AND enemy healing effects by up to 60%. Chaos Gambit has a 40% chance for +50% damage. Rose of War reduces enemy squad damage dealt by up to 20%. Golden Rhythm boosts Archer total Attack by up to 30%. Her exclusive gear Aeolian is the highest-power gear documented (416,250) and adds +1010 Attack, +832 Defense, +6243 Health, +92.50% Lethality, +92.50% Health — all record highs. Night Reverie and Perihelion complete the gear skill pair. Her tier ratings: A-tier Rally, B-tier Garrison/Bear, specialist role in arena. heroes.js marks her as F2P=false with the advice 'only invest if you see a clear shard path' — she has 3 F2P pools but community consensus is that realistic accumulation requires spending. Lore is thin in the research pass — neither kingshot-data nor kingshotwiki returned a backstory section for Rosa.
unverified_fields: lore_background — no backstory in consulted sources
Category conflict on Battle Focus (kingshot-data=Conquest, kingshotwiki=Expedition) — used Expedition
3 Expedition skills (Chaos Gambit, Rose of War, Golden Rhythm) — single source (kingshotwiki only)

effect_op_codes.description: Gen 4 game-changing support archer — Battle Focus active cleanse + buff
